title: Death and EoE on Japanese TV
display_title: Death and EoE on Japanese TV
wikitext:
[]: Death and EoE on Japanese TV             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Aug 17, 2014 6:43 pm Anybody gonna try to watch Death (tomorrow for us) and EoE (next Monday)? I thought there were some programs out there that lets you stream Japanese channels, but I have no idea if NTV would be one of 'em. Looks like Death starts 1:59 A.M. (around 2 A.M.) Japan time, so that'd be 1 P.M. on the U.S. East Coast. EoE next Monday looks like it starts at 2:14 A.M. = 1:14 P.M. East Coast. http://www.ntv.co.jp/eigatengoku/index.html I know Death and EoE have been on Japanese TV before, but I don't know the exact details. EoE info: http://www.ntv.co.jp/eigatengoku/20140825.html Oh, and the schedule/some details: Sailor Star Dust wrote: [url]http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3126.html[/url] Also, Death and EoE will air on Japanese TV in August, but who cares about that. Hype for new preview at the end of the TV version. Exact lineup: August 18th: Death (true)2 August 25: EoE (Death and EoE are part of NTV's Movie Heaven block (on Monday(s?)), different from Friday Roadshow.) August 22nd: Eva 1.0 TV Version August 29th: Eva 2.0 TV Version September 5th: Eva 3.0 TV Version + God Warrior TV Version Edit: Slight clarification.

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Sun Aug 17, 2014 9:56 pm So many fans that have only seen the rebuilds are gonna be in for a suprise.

[]:             Quote Post by Adaminator1 » Sun Aug 17, 2014 10:47 pm If it's being streamed, I'd love to watch! Otherwise I can always just watch along with my legally purchased but shitty quality DVD's.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Aug 17, 2014 11:04 pm *sees image in the link for EoE* Oh! Oh. Oh.....

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Sun Aug 17, 2014 11:07 pm Why would they Air EOE and then the rebuilds? Coincidence? I think not!

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Sun Aug 17, 2014 11:21 pm So people can watch them Watch = watch, where's your watch, Shinji? Time has come today. Take Nebuchadnezzar's key and open the door, get on the floor, everybody walk the time warp.

[]:             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Mon Aug 18, 2014 1:12 am I wonder how badly End of Evangelion will be censored.. assuming Japanese television has the same sort of restrictions American television has.

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Mon Aug 18, 2014 1:17 am They'll probably have to cut AT LEAST the scene in the hospital room.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Aug 18, 2014 5:17 am It's airing at 2am local time. It has aired plenty of times before without cuts or any other problems.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Mon Aug 18, 2014 11:35 am I'm so *bleeped* up Cut to hand covered in mustard

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Aug 18, 2014 11:52 am Sigh. Thank the stars Executor isn't around any longer... By the way, I think it's time you guys started talking something sensible. The movies airing is good stuff, but this thread is degenerating.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Aug 18, 2014 2:22 pm DEATH started! Don't see much reactions on Twitter to it yet. Just lots of people posting links to this 2ch-style board (Yaraon).

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Aug 18, 2014 2:29 pm Well judging by some of the screenshots that have been popping up places 2 things are obvious: 1. No new HD master was made available for this broadcast (so it either doesn't exist or is being saved for later) 2. The old master used is upscaled analog garbage that is entirely unsuitable for a BD release by any respectable company. http://i.minus.com/i4xWNUuM9Dubk.jpg http://i.minus.com/inhv8zaNNMBak.jpg So that should put a damped on people who think a BD release of the old is right around the corner :P

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Aug 18, 2014 2:37 pm FWIW, my screenshot of smiling Rei is from my copy of Renewal DEATH(True)^2, but that's pretty disappointing about the broadcast. Thanks for the info, it's appreciated! Hope you can upload some example screenshots of EoE next Monday, too.

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Mon Aug 18, 2014 2:40 pm God, Rei's smile is, and forever will be simply beautiful

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Aug 18, 2014 2:45 pm "The continuation's next week!" tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) Wonder if they'll be any fun reactions to 1.0 and onward the next 3 Fridays...

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Tue Aug 19, 2014 1:39 am BLU RAY HYPE

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Aug 24, 2014 9:42 pm EoE-TV version on Japan's NTV tomorrow (Monday) 2:14 A.M. Japan-time (1:14 P.M. East Coast). Even Minna No Eva Fan refers to EoE as a remake of the last 2 TV episodes: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3241.html

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sun Aug 24, 2014 9:49 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: EoE-TV version on Japan's NTV tomorrow (Monday) 2:14 A.M. Japan-time (1:14 P.M. East Coast).

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Aug 24, 2014 10:11 pm It's a perfect timeslot for a good wank.
